items.name: Mei-Lin Chen
items.bio: Mei-Lin trained in both Western therapeutic massage and traditional Tui Na, and leads our East Asian therapies. Clients come to her for deep, focused work on long-standing tension.

items.name: James Park
items.bio: A former athletic trainer, James specializes in sports and recovery work for runners, lifters, and weekend warriors across Orange County.

items.name: Sofia Reyes
items.bio: Certified in prenatal massage, Sofia creates calm, side-lying comfort for expecting clients and is a favorite for hot stone and Swedish relaxation.

items.name: Grace Wong
items.bio: Grace leads our facial and skincare menu, tailoring each treatment to the skin in front of her rather than a one-size protocol.
